---
title : "Design of a Conjoint Survey Experiment: Inequality and Deservingness in Higher Education in Chile"
date : "2026-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Laffert, Andreas & Canales-Selles, Rene"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " Workshop on Experimental Approaches to Redistribution and Deservingness . Chile"
publication_short : " Workshop on Experimental Approaches to Redistribution and Deservingness . Chile"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Laffert, Andreas & Canales-Selles, Rene (2026). *Design of a Conjoint Survey Experiment: Inequality and Deservingness in Higher Education in Chile*.  Workshop on Experimental Approaches to Redistribution and Deservingness . Chile

:::
